title: Item Frame Tweaks
description: A simple mod to rid yourself of those pesky item frame nametags and remove the invisible item frame offset
body:
## Have you ever played with a CIT pack and the nametags were annoying you? Or does it perhaps bother you, that an item gets shifted against the block when your item frames are invisible? *Because it bothered me enough to make this mod.*

You might not even have noticed the invisible item frame offset, because usually people who play with CIT packs use an invisible item frames resourcepack.

However I had reason to use invisible itemframes instead and this causes the models to be shifted around slightly, sometimes so noticably that it destroys a model completely.

However even if you don't use CIT packs, the offset can still mess with certain decorations.

## Now comes with a config file! You can now change if you want to render the nametag in the `item-frame-tweaks.json`.
**Changing this requires you to restart your game!**
This is my first published mod, so if my code is bad feel free to point it out so I can improve!
